-muhyati, ˚te, to be confused, become bewildered or stupefied, faint away,  Yājñ. ;  MBh.  &c. :

results.rendered_html:
vimuh 4 P.
1 To be confused, bewildered, or perplexed, be embarrassed;  Bg. 2. 72 ; 3. 6 , 27 .
2 To be foolish or infatuated.
— Caus.
1 To infatuate, bewilder.
2 To allure, tempt, seduce.
